     The Numbers Business Report

Smile 2 (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $69,012,586Details
International Box Office $69,011,778
Worldwide Box Office $138,024,364
Further financial details...

Synopsis

About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,021,692 (33.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.00 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,619 opening theaters/3,624 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $72,978,832

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 18th, 2024 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: October 16th, 2024 (Wide), released as Smile 2 (스마일 2) (South Korea)
October 16th, 2024 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 16th, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 16th, 2024 (Wide) (Egypt)
October 16th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland (French Speaking))
Video Release: November 19th, 2024 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violent content, grisly images, language throughout and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2850 (cert #54988), 9/3/2024)
Running Time: 127 minutes
Franchise: Smile
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New York, United States
Plot point: Curses, Singers
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Based on Short Film
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Temple Hill Entertainment, Paramount Pictures, Bad Feeling
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
